query: Find nearby Italian restaurants and get reviews for the highest rated one.
plan: Google Places API (to find nearby Italian restaurants)
Yelp API (to get reviews for the highest rated restaurant found by Google Places API)

steps.step: Google Places API (to find nearby Italian restaurants)
Yelp API (to get reviews for the highest rated restaurant found by Google Places API)

final_answer: The highest-rated Italian restaurant near you is [name of the restaurant]. It has received an average rating of [average rating] from [number of reviewers] Yelp users, with notable reviews including "[review excerpt 1]", "[review excerpt 2]", and "[review excerpt 3]".
